title: dysoxylum brachybotrys
intro: Dysoxylum brachybotrys, also known as the Philippine Ash, is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum brachybotrys include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various diseases due to its immunomodulatory effects. Dysoxylum brachybotrys can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
